title: Validate improvement-ticket round-trip into the builder queue with review gate
problem: Improvement tickets are generated and validated for builder consumption (GT20/GT21), but no ticket has round-tripped: generated ticket → promoted into tickets/ queue → implemented → verified. The self-improvement loop is plumbed, not proven.
acceptance_criteria: A generated improvement ticket can be promoted to a valid queue ticket JSON via an explicit reviewed step.
Promotion never happens implicitly during pipeline runs.
Promoted format passes GT21 builder-consumption validation rules.
Documented promotion workflow in AGENTS or operating protocol.
Golden tests and default pytest pass without Ollama.
non_goals: Do not auto-insert generated tickets into TICKET_QUEUE.md without review.
Do not implement ticket-040 CI workflow in this ticket.
Do not add cloud providers or live discovery.
